meta.title: LeanBrothers – Lean & AI Consulting for SMEs | Process Optimization, RPA, Automation
meta.description: Independent Lean and AI consulting for Hungarian SMEs. We identify process waste, calculate ROI, and bring in the right automation solution – vendor-neutral. UiPath RPA, process optimization, AI implementation.

problem.subtitle: Before implementing technology, we need to understand the real problem.

cards.title: A bad foundation costs double
cards.text: Automation built on flawed processes costs twice as much – once to implement, once to discard.

cards.title: Product is Not a Solution
cards.text: Vendors see their own tools as the answer to everything. We ensure that technology truly serves you, not the other way around.

cards.title: Real ROI = ordered processes
cards.text: ROI is only real when the process is in order first. Automation cannot work miracles.

steps.title: We bring in the right partner

team.label: The Team

team.subtitle: Experienced professionals who learned their craft at large enterprises – and now share it with SMEs.

members.name: Tóth Zoltán Márton
members.role: Lean Six Sigma Expert & IT Business Analyst
members.bio: 20+ years of experience in logistics and process optimization. Led the Lean transformation at Magyar Posta, currently IT Business Analyst and Lean Six Sigma process expert at MVM. Specializes in value stream analysis and supporting decision systems with generative AI. Winner of the 2024 'Business Analyst of the Year: BA team methodological development category' award.

members.name: Kiss Gábor Balázs
members.role: RPA Solution Architect | UiPath & C# Expert
members.bio: "If something has to be done four times, I automate it." – Has worked at Magyar Posta for 20 years, 4 of which as a lead RPA architect. Built from the ground up: from operator to enterprise-level automation expert. Designs scalable, long-term maintainable solutions in UiPath, C# and AI integration.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: What people ask most
faq.subtitle: Short, honest answers – before we get in touch.

items.q: When should you involve a Lean consultant before automation?
items.a: When the process you want to automate is not yet optimized. RPA or AI built on a flawed process costs twice as much – once to implement, once to discard. Lean diagnostics are a prerequisite for sustainable ROI.

items.q: What does an RPA implementation cost for Hungarian SMEs?
items.a: The cost depends on the complexity of the process and the number of steps to automate. After a preliminary Lean diagnostic and ROI calculation, you'll know exactly whether the investment pays off. LeanBrothers provides a custom quote – the first consultation is free.

items.q: What's the difference between a Lean consultant and an RPA/AI vendor?
items.a: A vendor wants to sell technology – that's their interest. An independent Lean consultant like LeanBrothers is not tied to any vendor: we first order the process, calculate the ROI, then recommend the best solution – which may not require any software at all.

items.q: What size company benefits most from process optimization?
items.a: LeanBrothers primarily works with SMEs of 50+ employees where there are already repetitive, manual processes (e.g. data entry, reporting, invoicing), but the company size doesn't yet justify large software license spend.

items.q: How soon will we see the first results?
items.a: The Lean diagnosis alone – without any automation – identifies tangible savings within the first 2 days. Automation projects typically go live within 6–12 weeks, and ROI is typically realized within 6–18 months.

items.q: GDPR and EU AI Act: how does this affect our implementation?
items.a: The EU AI Act entered into force in 2024 and is being phased in gradually. If you automate processes involving personal data or decision support, compliance assessment is mandatory. LeanBrothers integrates AI legal compliance into vendor selection criteria – not as an afterthought, but at the design stage.
